# adampang.com

> The personal hub and internet home of Adam Pang (Adam Tomas Guzman
> Pangelinan), a builder, writer, and musician from Guam, currently living
> at Network School in Langkawi, Malaysia. Everything he makes links back
> to this one address.

adampang.com is the front door to Adam's whole body of work. The homepage is
a bento of four spectrums of a person: sights (what he sees), sounds (what he
hears), curiosity (what he wonders about), and creativity (what he makes).
The core idea: make a person's body of work legible from a single, memorable
12-character address, and cross-link everything back to it.

## Key links
- [Home](https://adampang.com/): the four-spectrum bento. sights, sounds, curiosity, creativity.
- [About](https://adampang.com/about): who he is, chronologically. milestones and receipts.
- [Now](https://adampang.com/now): what he is doing right now. a now page in the sivers tradition.
- [Network School](https://adampang.com/ns): living at Balaji's internet frontier as longtermer #2.
- [Support](https://adampang.com/support): tip jar, crypto, and the referral wall.

## Elsewhere
- Newsletter: https://pangaea.blog
- Studio: https://anchormarianas.com (Anchor Marianas LLC)
- Music suite: https://strummer.fun
- Concert series: https://wonderhall.live
- X: https://x.com/adamtpang
- GitHub: https://github.com/adamtpang

## About
- Adam Pang, born on Guam. Longtermer #2 at Network School since March 2025.
- Builds solo. Ships in public. Archives what does not grow.
- Contact: adamtpang@gmail.com
